content.speakerText: How long does approval usually take?
expectedAnswers: About 3 to 5 business days after you submit it.
Typically, it takes around a week, but if your manager is away, it could be longer.
It usually takes a few days—most approvals are done within 5 working days.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明了审批周期范围
语言准确性：语法和时态是否正确，是否使用了专业表达如 'business days'
表达自然度：是否符合职场口语习惯，避免生硬或过度正式
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'approval', 'submit', 'business days', 'longer' 等核心词

content.speakerText: When will the money hit my account?
expectedAnswers: Within two days after approval, since payroll is processed every Friday.
It usually takes a few days—depending on the bank, but always by the next pay cycle.
You’ll see it in your account right after the payroll runs, which is every Friday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否结合发薪周期解释到账时间
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'within', 'payroll', 'cycle' 等术语
表达自然度：是否避免机械重复，有合理变体
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'approval', 'payroll', 'next cycle', 'bank' 等关键表达

content.speakerText: I submitted my reimbursement last week. Has it been approved yet?
content.speakerTextCn: 我上周提交了报销，审批通过了吗？
expectedAnswers: It’s probably still in process—approval usually takes 3–5 days, so check back early next week.
If it’s been more than a week, you might want to follow up with your manager, especially if they’re traveling.
It should be approved by now unless there’s an issue—have you confirmed your receipts are complete?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否合理回应查询，提供信息或建议下一步
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的时态和职场表达（如 'in process', 'follow up', 'receipts'）
表达自然度：是否语气礼貌、符合职场沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'submitted', 'approval', 'process', 'manager', 'receipts' 等场景关键词
